subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer in the desert of God's love! That which thou didst write was noted, and its meanings moved the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته صحرای محبت الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ گردید و معانیش قلب را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
